response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong staff-level generalist with 15+ years of shipping software and directly relevant recent exposure to MCP code generation and agentic-workflow tooling at Stripe, but he falls well short of the role's core requirement of 8+ years building production AI solutions. His resume shows no RAG, vector database, evaluation-pipeline, or LLM optimization work, and Python is absent from his skill list. He could grow into the role given his engineering depth and demonstrated teaching ability, but he does not meet the stated bar for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI Engineer today.
strengths: Current Staff Engineer at Stripe contributing to MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly relevant to the role's key technologies
Deep TypeScript/Node full-stack experience plus cloud deployment exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) across high-scale systems
Proven communicator and mentor: conference talks, multi-day courses, and workshops suggest aptitude for customer-facing technical leadership
concerns: AI-specific experience is roughly one year, far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, data pipelines for unstructured data, or AI evaluation/observability work
Python is not listed among his skills, and there is no demonstrated enterprise customer discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience

key_factors.factor: Missing 8+ years of AI solution development
Hands-on MCP and agentic tooling work at Stripe
No RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation experience
